task: Fix gain pipeline so user's compound chains and lex-scope queries actually show savings. Three real bugs: (B1) chain detection rejects piped segments killing decomposition; (B2) /gain matchesCwd uses exact equality, losing subdir savings; (B3) installed dist/omp uses stale pi-natives without chain decomposition support. Plus broaden filter coverage to common shell builtins (echo/printf) so all-purpose chains register.

stories.title: B2: prefix-match cwd filter in /gain and omp gain
acceptanceCriteria: packages/coding-agent/src/minimizer-gain.ts matchesCwd treats cwd as a path prefix
loadMinimizerGainContext at lex root aggregates subdir cwds
Existing exact-match tests pass
New test asserts no false sibling matches
stories.evidence: minimizer-gain.ts:411-419 prefix-matches with path.sep boundary. Test 'matchesCwd prefix-matches subdirectories without false sibling matches' asserts /repo aggregates /repo, /repo/sub, /repo/sub/deep but excludes /repo-sibling. Test 'matchesCwd handles trailing separator on scope without doubling it' covers /repo/ === /repo. Live: omp gain --days 1 from /Users/davidandrews/PycharmProjects/lex now reports 259 cmds / 1.6M bytes / 422K tokens (was previously only exact-match records).

stories.title: B1: chain decomposition tolerates piped segments
acceptanceCriteria: plan.rs simple_segment accepts pipelines with seq.len() > 1
rejects_unsafe_chain_segments still passes
New rust test asserts chain with piped segment
cargo test -p pi-shell exits 0
stories.evidence: plan.rs:217 changed `pipeline.seq.len() != 1` -> `pipeline.seq.is_empty()`; identifies segment by first stage. New test 'chain_with_piped_segment_is_segmented' asserts `ls *.txt | head -5 && git status --short` -> Chain with segments[0].program='ls', segments[1].program='git'. Existing rejects_unsafe_chain_segments + rejects_legacy_opaque_shapes still pass. cargo test -p pi-shell: 326/326 pass (one flaky shell.rs test passes on isolated re-run).

stories.title: Filter coverage: common shell utilities make chains eligible
acceptanceCriteria: Common utilities echo/printf/head/tail/file/which/type/sed/awk/sleep/seq/cp/mv/rm/mkdir/touch/basename/dirname/realpath/readlink/true/false/yes/tr/tee/sort/uniq/cut/paste/rev/split/comm/patch/xargs/unzip/zip/tar/gzip/gunzip/cd/pwd/export/env/test become chain-eligible
Whole-command minimization remains unchanged for these (avoid buffering for trivial outputs)
chain_has_eligible_segment returns true for chains containing them
Existing rust filter tests still pass
stories.evidence: engine.rs is_common_chain_utility() new fn; engine.rs chain_has_eligible_segment OR-includes it. Whole-command path untouched (supports() unchanged). Test segmented_chain_mode_is_only_for_eligible_safe_chains updated: `false && echo no ; echo yes` now SegmentedChain (matches new behavior). All other assertions in that test still pass. 326 pi-shell tests green.

stories.title: B3: rebuild native pi-natives + dist/omp binary
acceptanceCriteria: packages/natives build exits 0
Live executeShell test returns minimized.filter='chain'/'chain-noop' for compound chain
dist/omp rebuilt and bigger than source mtime
stories.evidence: packages/natives build: 'Build complete' (release profile, 13.15s). packages/coding-agent build: 'Build complete; Generated src/embedded-client.generated.txt; bundle 2973 modules; compile dist/omp'. Live test: executeShell('echo a && echo b && head -1 package.json') returns minimized.filter='chain-noop' (chain decomposition fires; output too short for real savings but native correctly records it instead of returning null).

stories.title: Tests + regression + lint
acceptanceCriteria: bun test minimizer-gain.test.ts exits 0
bun test acp-builtins.test.ts exits 0
cargo test -p pi-shell exits 0
biome lint clean
No new tsgo errors
stories.evidence: bun test minimizer-gain.test.ts: 11/11 pass. bun test acp-builtins.test.ts: 70/70 pass (combined 81/81 across both files, 275 expect calls). cargo test -p pi-shell --lib: 326 pass with 1 flaky shell.rs test (signal 143 SIGTERM) that passes on isolated re-run; unrelated to our edits. biome lint on minimizer-gain.ts + test: 'No fixes applied'. tsgo: no errors on modified files (pre-existing cursor.ts errors unrelated).
